meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Can't Debug Code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use this advanced AI-driven checklist featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, build cleaner, and ship client projects.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By integrating AI-assisted design patterns with Claude Code's terminal-native debugging, you can automate root-cause analysis. Use Antigravity to architect modular, self-healing components, then leverage Claude's context-aware CLI to execute surgical fixes, turning hours of frustrating troubleshooting into minutes of high-velocity deployment.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the console bleeds red, and the deadline is breathing down your neck. You are trapped in the 'debugging loop'—that soul-crushing cycle where one fix births two new regressions. As a freelancer, your time is your currency, and spending it chasing ghost errors is a tax you can no longer afford to pay.

But the paradigm has shifted. You are no longer just a coder; you are an AI Orchestrator. By embedding AI directly into your design and execution workflow, you turn the debugging process from a reactive chore into a proactive architectural discipline. Let’s dismantle the wall between 'code that works' and 'code that scales.'

steps.title: Architect for Observability
steps.description: Before writing a single line of logic, design your components with clear state boundaries to make future debugging trivial.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this feature requirement. Propose a component architecture that maximizes state isolation and makes error tracing easier through decoupled logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this file structure for potential state-management bottlenecks and suggest a more resilient pattern.'

steps.title: Automate Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into the AI to identify patterns rather than guessing the cause.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I have these stack traces. Identify the common denominator across these failures and map them to the specific module causing the side effects.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Design Patterns
steps.description: Use AI to inject type-safety and error boundaries into your code to prevent runtime crashes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite this fragile service layer to include exhaustive error handling, graceful degradation, and type-checked response schemas.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement Zod validation for all incoming API responses in src/services/api.ts'

steps.title: Synthetic Test Generation
steps.description: Generate high-coverage unit tests that focus on edge cases that typically cause your bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Vitest unit tests for this function, specifically targeting null-pointer exceptions and asynchronous race conditions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Generate comprehensive unit tests for the current module, focusing on boundary conditions.'

steps.title: Autonomous Refactoring
steps.description: Apply clean code principles to your codebase to ensure complexity doesn't lead to future bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this complex conditional block into a strategy pattern to reduce cyclomatic complexity and improve readability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor 'Reduce cyclomatic complexity in this file using the strategy pattern and verify no functionality changes.'

pro_tips: Always pass your project's .cursorrules or context file to Claude Code to ensure the AI adheres to your specific coding standards.
Use Antigravity to build a 'Decision Log'—have the AI document why a specific architectural choice was made to avoid 'why did I do this?' moments later.
Run Claude Code in 'dry-run' mode on complex refactors to preview changes before committing to the disk.
When debugging, ask the AI to 'explain the state transition' before asking it to 'fix the code' to ensure you understand the flow.
Treat your error logs as data: periodically feed them into an AI agent to spot recurring architectural weaknesses before they become production outages.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI-assisted workflows into your CI/CD pipeline, ensuring every commit is reviewed by your AI agent before reaching production.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing billable hours to recursive debugging. Master the AI-first approach to architecture and reclaim your development speed today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
